title: psychotria desseinii subsp. desseinii
intro: Psychotria desseinii subsp. desseinii, also known as 'Kiwassa', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Africa, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have potential benefits in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Psychotria desseinii subsp. desseinii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases due to its antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
